chunks.text: Cloud computing provides on-demand access to computing resources such as servers, storage, databases, and networking over the internet.
Infrastructure as a Service (IaaS) allows users to rent virtual machines, storage, and networking resources.
Platform as a Service (PaaS) provides a managed environment for developing, testing, and deploying applications.
Software as a Service (SaaS) delivers fully managed applications that users access through a web browser.
Major cloud providers include Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
